response.justification: While Bogdan possesses extensive software development experience and expertise in various technologies, the resume lacks direct experience in the core areas of this specialized Principal Performance Architect role. There is no explicit mention of AI accelerator optimization, SoC/IP modeling, deep-learning workload performance analysis, or GPU architecture, which are central to the job description's requirements.
strengths: Extensive experience (14+ years) in diverse software development roles, demonstrating strong technical breadth.
Proficiency in low-level programming (C/C++, DLang) and experience with low-latency systems.
Background in general performance optimization for software systems and 'AI-agent infrastructure'.
concerns: Lack of direct experience with AI accelerators, GPU architecture, or deep learning workload optimization.
No explicit mention of SoC/IP modeling, IP integration, or system-on-chip design feedback.
Primary experience is in web, full-stack, and general software development, not hardware-focused AI infrastructure.
